## Meeting Purpose

[To discuss Jakub Rudnik's participation in Pepper Content's SEO-focused webinar series.](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Webinar scheduled for Thursday, August 14th, 10-11 AM CT (30-45 min session)](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Focus on SEO and AI, particularly GEO and AU topics](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [Pepper Content rebranding to "Pepper" with multiple verticals (content, creative, AI, SEO)](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Webinar reaches \~45k viewers post-publication via website, newsletter, and social media](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)

## Topics

### Pepper Content Overview

  - [Founded 2017 by Anirudh Sinla and batchmates](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Grew during lockdown with PepperType AI app (6000+ users in 6 months)](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Shifting from content to creative, SEO, AI](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Rebranding as "Pepper" with multiple verticals](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [200+ employees, expanding globally (India, US, Singapore)](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Among first 50 GPT-3 users](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)

### Webinar Series Details

  - [Started last month, 3 webinars completed](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Focus: SEO evolution pre/post-AI for new/entry-level professionals](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=156.0)
  - [Key question: "Is SEO dead or still working in AI era?"](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Previous topics: "Optimizing for AI or search?", "AI in the LLM world"](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Co-founder Kishan Panpalya hosts from US](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [50-60 live attendees, \~45k post-webinar views](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)

### Webinar Logistics

  - [Date: Thursday, August 14th, 2025](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Time: 10-11 AM CT (Central Time)](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Format: 30 min conversation, 15 min Q\&A](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [Prep call 30 min before webinar start](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Flow and questions to be sent in advance](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)

### Content Focus

  - [Jakub comfortable with GEO and AU topics](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Open to specific angles within these areas](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Pepper to send topic suggestions post-call](https://fathom.video/share/Hc4E4MsvvUoKN5KyYHbkMPB7_tm4qZxz?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
